# Two Admins & a Mic

> A podcast by two senior executive administrators — Diana Hansen and Melinda Vail Goodnight — sharing real conversations on leadership, executive support, and professional growth in the admin community.

Two Admins & a Mic is a podcast and content hub covering leadership development, executive administration, mentorship, and professional growth for the modern administrative professional. The site publishes podcast episodes, long-form blog articles, a leadership framework called STEPS, and branded merchandise.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest episodes, host introductions, and featured content.
- [About](/about): Bios for Diana Hansen and Melinda Vail Goodnight, the show's mission, and host expertise.
- [Episodes](/episodes): Full podcast episode library with filters by topic.
- [Blog](/blog): Editorial articles on leadership, executive support, and admin career growth.
- [STEPS](/steps): The STEPS leadership framework — a guided journey for admins growing into leaders.
- [Merch](/merch): Official Two Admins & a Mic apparel, accessories, and stickers.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the hosts and find all social links.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
